name: Roast Fish with Potatoes and Olives
recipeIngredient: 4 6 oz. pieces sea bass, snapper or other white fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Drain and place in a bowl. Toss with olive oil, garlic, bay leaves, black olives, artichokes, white wine, and water.
3. Preheat oven to 450°F.
4. Season fish with salt and pepper.
5. Place potatoes in a baking dish along with the marinade.
6. Top with fish.
7. Bake for 15 - 20 minutes or until potatoes are crusty and fish is cooked.
